options.name: Full settings view
options.description: Gear becomes a real rail view: section sidebar + generous content pane, search on top — the IDE-preferences idiom.

options.name: Preferences modal
options.description: Classic centered tabbed dialog over the dimmed board; staged edits, one atomic Save.

options.name: Slide-over drawer
options.description: Right-edge panel (ideation-chat idiom) with accordion sections and live filter; the board stays visible and running.

options.name: Command palette
options.description: Search-first: every config leaf indexed as a dotted path; fuzzy-find, inline edit, done. No browsing at all.

options.name: YAML lens
options.description: Form and the real .humanconfig.yaml side by side, two-way synced with field⟷line highlighting.
